description: Dividend-growth compounder screen - ranks stocks RAISING the dividend (real 3y/5y dividend CAGR, multi-year growth streak, no cut, FCF-covered payout); tiers aristocrat/grower/emerging, high-yield traps quarantined. Output data/dividend-growth.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Daily 13:45 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. The account hit the classic EventBridge 300-rule cap; Scheduler (1M-schedule quota) is the go-forward scheduling path for all justhodl engines. Provisioned by ops 821.
